title: narcissus floribundus
intro: Narcissus floribundus, also known as the poet's narcissus or large-flowered daffodil, is a perennial bulbous plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its bright yellow trumpet-shaped flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, and is often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Narcissus floribundus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve mood, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying the flowers and leaves, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
